items.title: [负面] Es buen juego, bastante inspirado en slay the spir...
items.summary:
Es buen juego, bastante inspirado en slay the spire, el juego en si esta bien, pero tiene artefactos, cosa que en verdad me tira para atras en cualquier juego gacha, si no tuviera eso el juego seria mas entretenido

si lo de farmear artefactos por horas para cada personaje no es algo que te molest

The Story Dialog box control feels very bad.

items.title: [正面] This is what Slay the Spire should have been, a Da...
items.summary:
This is what Slay the Spire should have been, a Dark souls Deck builder RPG, with a really a good story and their Gacha is just as generous as Limbus Corp, as close 2nd and far better then all those other CCP/Korean Mafia Corpro conglomerate games 

Gacha and Tier list won't help you here, if you do

items.title: [负面] The game is cursed.  I can't exit it without doing...
items.summary: The game is cursed.  I can't exit it without doing ctrl-alt-del and ending the task. Ridiculous.

items.title: [正面] Pros: Good story, good art, good music, good voice...
items.summary:
Pros: Good story, good art, good music, good voices, generous item distribution
Cons: The gambling needs to be rebalanced. I should not be spending 50 cores and getting the same 3 cards and 1 awakener.
The devs actually care about their players, giving silver as an apology for disrupting gameplay with maintenance, and quickly fixing issues and compensating players for having to encounter said issues. For such a new game, I'm very impressed. It has the potential to be a 5/5 star game

items.title: [正面] Its a very unique style of game, throws a hell of ...
items.summary: Its a very unique style of game, throws a hell of a lot at the player to start with but your able to understand things well enough to enjoy it. Large variety of charecters and an interesting story thusfar. I recommend this if your a fan of card style games or have the unfortunate affinity for Darkest Dungeon and like games.
